termos.title: Terms of Use
termos.introducaoTexto: Welcome to SmartWallet! These Terms of Use govern the use of our personal finance management application. By accessing and using SmartWallet, you agree to comply with these terms. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our service.
termos.aceitacaoTexto: By creating an account on SmartWallet, you declare that:
termos.aceitacaoItem1: You are at least 18 years old or of legal age in your jurisdiction
termos.aceitacaoItem2: You have legal capacity to enter into binding contracts
termos.aceitacaoItem3: All information provided is true, accurate, and complete
termos.aceitacaoItem4: You are authorized to use this service in compliance with applicable laws
termos.usoTexto: You agree to use SmartWallet only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You may not:
termos.usoItem1: Use the service in a fraudulent or deceptive manner
termos.usoItem2: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
termos.usoItem3: Infringe third-party rights, including intellectual property rights
termos.usoItem4: Transmit viruses, malware, or any malicious code
termos.usoItem5: Attempt to access SmartWallet systems without authorization
termos.usoItem6: Use robots or automated methods to access the service
termos.contaTexto: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password. You must immediately notify SmartWallet of any unauthorized use of your account. SmartWallet shall not be liable for any losses arising from unauthorized use of your account.
termos.contaDicaTexto: Keep your login credentials secure. Never share your password with others.
termos.dadosTexto1: SmartWallet collects and processes your personal data as described in our Privacy Policy. By using the service, you consent to such processing.
termos.dadosTexto2: All your financial data is stored securely and encrypted. We use appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your information.
termos.limitacaoTexto1: SmartWallet is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee that the service will always be available, secure, or error-free.
termos.limitacaoTexto2: In no event shall SmartWallet be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.
termos.alteracoesTexto: SmartWallet reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be communicated through the application. Continued use of the service after the publication of changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
termos.contatoTexto: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us:

privacidade.title: Privacy Policy
privacidade.compromissoTexto: SmartWallet takes your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, share, and protect your personal information. By using our application, you agree to the practices described in this policy.
privacidade.coletamosTexto: We collect the following categories of information:
privacidade.coletamosContaTexto: Name, email, encrypted password, date of birth, and gender provided during registration.
privacidade.coletamosFinanceirosTexto: Information about your income, debts, and financial transactions that you manually add to the application.
privacidade.coletamosUsoTexto: Information about how you use the application, including theme preferences and settings.
privacidade.usamosItem2: Personalize your experience in the application
privacidade.usamosItem3: Send notifications about debts and reminders
privacidade.compartilhamentoTexto2: sells your personal information. We share your data only in the following circumstances:
privacidade.compartilhamentoItem1Texto: Companies that help us operate the application (hosting, infrastructure)
privacidade.compartilhamentoItem2Texto: When required by law or competent authorities
privacidade.compartilhamentoItem3Texto: To protect our rights or safety
privacidade.segurancaTexto: We implement robust security measures to protect your information:
privacidade.segurancaTexto1: Data encrypted at rest and in transit
privacidade.direitosTexto: You have the following rights regarding your data:
privacidade.direitosItem1Texto: Request a copy of your data
privacidade.direitosItem4Texto: Receive your data in readable format
privacidade.notificacoesTexto: You can configure which notifications you wish to receive in the application settings. You can disable notifications at any time.
privacidade.retencaoTexto: We keep your data only as long as necessary to provide our services. When you delete your account, we will remove your data within 30 days, except when required by law to retain certain data longer.
privacidade.criancasTexto: SmartWallet is not directed at children under 13. We do not intentionally collect information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.
privacidade.alteracoesTexto: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes through the application. The date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was last updated.
privacidade.contatoTexto: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

faleConosco.title: Contact Us
faleConosco.subtitle: We're here to help!
faleConosco.msgObrigado: Thank you for contacting us! We'll respond shortly
faleConosco.faq1a: Yes! SmartWallet is 100% free. We do not charge a monthly fee.
faleConosco.faq2a: Yes! State-of-the-art encryption and AWS infrastructure.
faleConosco.faq3q: How do I recover my password?
faleConosco.faq3a: On the login screen, click 'Forgot your password'.
faleConosco.faq4a: All support is online, practical, and fast.
